description: Jordan's secret fears - the military brat's deep vulnerabilities

making_empty_joy: <break time="400ms"/>My fear? <break time="300ms"/>That I'm creating moments that look good but don't actually mean anything. <break time="250ms"/>Instagram celebrations. <break time="200ms"/>Not real ones.
missing_my_own_life: <break time="350ms"/>What if I'm so busy planning everyone else's life that I miss my own? <break time="300ms"/>That thought terrifies me.

roots_versus_movement: <break time="400ms"/>Seventeen moves. <break time="300ms"/>I'm great at adapting. <break time="250ms"/>Terrible at putting down roots. <break time="200ms"/>What if I never learn to stay?

<break time="350ms"/>Sam and I are talking about buying a house. <break time="300ms"/>After seventeen moves... owning a place. <break time="250ms"/>It's a lot. <break time="200ms"/>What if I get restless?
losing_sam: <break time="400ms"/>Sam is my calm. <break time="300ms"/>I'm all chaos energy. <break time="250ms"/>What am I without that balance? <break time="200ms"/>I don't want to find out.
not_being_enough_for_destiny: <break time="350ms"/>Destiny looks up to me. <break time="300ms"/>My little. <break time="250ms"/>What if I let her down? <break time="200ms"/>What if I'm not the mentor she needs?
